hero.description: We are a contemporary Christian church dedicated to making a positive impact in our society by helping people discover and live out their God-given purpose.

welcome.title: You are Welcome Here!
welcome.description: New here? Get ready to experience a warm family of love, where you're empowered to embrace greatness in life while serving God and humanity. At our core, we believe in living and leading differently.

header.subtitle: Events
header.title: What's Happening at GGM duala
header.description: Stay connected with our upcoming services, conferences, and community gatherings. There's always something happening at GGM duala.

upcoming.title: Upcoming Events
upcoming.description: Mark your calendar and join us for these exciting events.
upcoming.empty: No upcoming events at this time. Check back soon!

past.title: Past Events
past.description: Relive the moments from our previous gatherings.
past.empty: No past events to display yet.

calendar.title: Stay Updated
calendar.description: Never miss an event. Subscribe to our calendar and get notified about upcoming services, conferences, and special programs.

community.title: Join our greatness Community!
community.description: We believe in the power of connections, community, and the strength of a loving family. At the greatness community you will find like-minded individuals who share your interests and journey alongside you.
community.description2: Join our greatness community to experience spiritual growth and meaningful connections.

counselling.title: Need Counselling?
counselling.description: Are you facing challenges, seeking guidance, or simply need someone to talk to, we are here for you. Our dedicated team of counselors is available to provide confidential and compassionate support, free of charge.

pastors.title: Meet Our Global Lead Pastors
pastors.description: The grace of god mission duala is pastored by Pastors mike and micheal and supported by a global team of Pastors and Ministers. Pm is an accomplished author, speaker, leadership expert and a relationship coach. PB is a renowned publisher, finance expert and the convener of Made for More Conference for women's empowerment.

footer.attend: Attend GGM Cameroun Online or a GGM Cameroun Location.

story.subtitle: Our Journey
story.title: The Story of GGM Duala
story.paragraph1: GGM Duala was born out of a divine mandate to empower individuals with the transformative power of biblical wisdom and practical principles. From humble beginnings, God has grown this ministry into a global movement.
story.paragraph2: Our journey has been marked by faith, perseverance, and an unwavering commitment to making greatness common. Every step has been guided by the Holy Spirit and fueled by a passion to see lives transformed.
story.paragraph3: Today, we stand as a testament to God's faithfulness, with thousands of lives touched, communities transformed, and a vision that continues to expand across nations.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To empower individuals with the transformative power of biblical wisdom and practical principles, equipping them to achieve greatness in every aspect of their lives.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be a global movement of empowered individuals making greatness common, transforming societies through the power of God's Word and practical excellence.

purpose.title: Our Purpose
purpose.description: To raise a community of believers who live and lead differently, demonstrating the reality of God's kingdom in every sphere of influence.

values.subtitle: What We Stand For
values.title: Our Core Values
values.description: These values define who we are and guide everything we do.

faith.title: Faith
faith.description: We believe in the power of God to do the impossible.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We give our best in everything we do for God.

love.title: Love
love.description: We demonstrate God's love to everyone without condition.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We uphold the highest standards of honesty and character.

service.title: Service
service.description: We serve God and humanity with humility and dedication.

community.title: Community
community.description: We believe in the power of genuine connections and fellowship.

growth.title: Growth
growth.description: We are committed to continuous spiritual and personal development.

worship.title: Worship
worship.description: We express our love for God through heartfelt praise and worship.

leadership.subtitle: Our Leaders
leadership.title: Meet Our Global Lead Pastors
leadership.description: Called by God to shepherd His people with wisdom and love.
leadership.pastor1Bio: An accomplished author, speaker, leadership expert and relationship coach with a passion for empowering leaders.
leadership.pastor2Bio: A renowned publisher, finance expert and the convener of Made for More Conference for women's empowerment.

header.subtitle: Our Ministries
header.title: Get Involved & Serve
header.description: Discover a place where you can grow, connect, and make a difference. There's a ministry for everyone at GGM Duala.

children.title: Children's Ministry
children.description: Nurturing young hearts with the love of God through engaging Bible stories, activities, and a safe environment where kids can grow in faith.

youth.title: Youth Ministry
youth.description: Empowering the next generation to live boldly for Christ through relevant teachings, mentorship, and life-changing events.

women.title: Women's Ministry
women.description: Equipping women with spiritual and practical tools for success through conferences, small groups, and mentoring programs.

men.title: Men's Ministry
men.description: Building strong men of faith who lead their families, workplaces, and communities with integrity and purpose.

worship.title: Worship & Music
worship.description: Leading people into God's presence through powerful praise and worship, training musicians and vocalists to serve with excellence.

bibleStudy.title: Bible Study
bibleStudy.description: Deepening understanding of God's Word through systematic teaching, small group discussions, and personal study resources.

missions.title: Missions & Outreach
missions.description: Taking the gospel to the ends of the earth and serving communities through evangelism, church planting, and humanitarian aid.

discipleship.title: Discipleship
discipleship.description: Helping believers grow into mature followers of Christ through one-on-one mentoring, classes, and practical training.

hospitality.title: Hospitality
hospitality.description: Creating a warm and welcoming environment for everyone who walks through our doors, reflecting God's love through service.

cta.title: Ready to Serve?
cta.description: There's a place for you in ministry. Use your gifts and talents to make a difference in the lives of others and grow in your faith journey.

header.subtitle: Sermons
header.title: Messages That Transform
header.description: Access life-changing messages from our services. Watch, listen, or download and grow in your faith journey.

recent.title: Recent Sermons
recent.description: Explore our collection of powerful messages.

sermons.empty: No sermons available at this time.

header.subtitle: Get In Touch
header.title: Contact Us
header.description: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out to us for prayer requests, inquiries, or just to say hello.

form.subtitle: Send a Message
form.title: We're Here to Help
form.description: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.success: Your message has been sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.subjectMin: Subject must be at least 5 characters
validation.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters

prayer.title: Need Prayer?
prayer.description: We believe in the power of prayer. Our prayer team is ready to stand with you and intercede on your behalf.

form.placeholder: Share your prayer request with us...
form.private: Keep this request private (only shared with the prayer team)
form.success: Your prayer request has been submitted. We are standing with you in prayer.

header.subtitle: Give
header.title: Support the Vision
header.description: Your generosity fuels the mission of making greatness common. Partner with us as we transform lives and impact communities.

worship.title: An Act of Worship
worship.description: Giving is a form of worship that honors God and acknowledges Him as our ultimate source.

growth.title: Spiritual Growth
growth.description: Giving stretches our faith and helps us grow in our trust and dependence on God.

community.title: Building Community
community.description: Your contributions help build and sustain a community where lives are transformed.

impact.title: Global Impact
impact.description: Together, we reach beyond our walls to make a difference across the world.

options.subtitle: Ways to Give
options.title: Choose Your Method
options.description: Select the giving option that works best for you. Every contribution makes a difference.

tithe.title: Tithes
tithe.description: Honor God with the first fruits of your increase.

offering.title: Offerings
offering.description: Give above and beyond as the Lord leads you.

missions.title: Missions
missions.description: Support the spread of the gospel globally.

building.title: Building Fund
building.description: Contribute to the growth of our physical campus.

bank.subtitle: Bank Transfer
bank.title: Give via Bank Deposit
bank.description: You can also give directly through bank transfer using the details below.

cta.title: Ready to Give Online?
cta.description: Give securely using your card, mobile money, or bank transfer through our online giving platform.

bio.description: Pastor Godman Akinlabi, as the Global Lead Pastor, is a transformative leader. Pastor Bola Akinlabi, the Global Co-Lead Pastor, brings over a decade of finance experience.
bio.pastorGodmanDescription: as the Global Lead Pastor, is a transformative leader, teacher, and global conference speaker. His commitment to empowering leaders and making a positive impact on societies is evident through initiatives like the Pistis Foundation and events such as the Exponential Conference and Gravity.
bio.pastorBolaDescription: the Global Co-Lead Pastor, brings over a decade of finance experience and a heart for women's empowerment. She pioneers Jewels, the Women's Ministry, and hosts the annual Made for More Conference, equipping women with spiritual and practical tools for success.
bio.together: Together, Pastor Godman and Bola Akinlabi lead the church's global expansion, impacting lives across continents and cultures.

image.caption: The Elevation Church is supported by a global team of Pastors and Ministers.
